CLM-2024-0891.description: Severe hail storm hit Grand Island area. Quarter-sized hail for approximately 20 minutes. Roof damage — missing and cracked shingles visible. Dents on north-facing aluminum siding. Two skylights cracked. Gutter damage on east side. No interior water damage yet but concerned about next rain.

timeline.event: Estimate sent to insured. Pending approval.

CLM-2024-1204.description: Rear-ended at stoplight on 72nd and Dodge. Other driver ran red light. Police report filed. No injuries. Bumper damage and possible frame misalignment. Other driver insured — State Farm policy. Other driver's info: Maria Gonzales, State Farm policy SF-4412876.

CLM-2024-0673.description: Straight-line winds from severe thunderstorm. Estimated 70-80 mph. Older barn partially collapsed. Two grain bins dented, one with roof damage. Fence line down along highway 81. 12 head of cattle got out, all recovered. No injuries.

timeline.event: Adjuster assigned — expedited due to livestock safety concern
Claim approved: $61,500 after deductible and depreciation

CLM-2025-0042.description: Company truck (unit 7, 2021 Freightliner Cascadia) jackknifed on I-80 near Kearney during ice storm. Driver Randy Becker Jr. Minor injuries — treated and released at CHI Good Samaritan. Truck towed to TA Petro in Kearney. Trailer load of farm equipment — shipper notified. DOT report filed.
CLM-2025-0042.injury_description: Driver — bruised ribs, minor lacerations. Treated at CHI Good Samaritan, Kearney. Released same day.

timeline.event: FNOL submitted by agency. Flagged high priority — injuries and commercial vehicle.
Adjuster inspected vehicle at TA Petro Kearney
Cargo claim opened separately under motor truck cargo policy

CLM-2024-0445.description: Catalytic converter stolen from vehicle while parked at apartment complex on Vinton Street overnight. Discovered in the morning when vehicle was extremely loud on startup.

timeline.event: Phone inspection completed — straightforward comp claim
